history.summary: Read-only review found no new blocking defects in the standalone video convergence batch; backend/frontend responsibility split and live persistence evidence are acceptable for the current scope.
Focused standalone video regression passed, and live API evidence confirmed persisted session metadata plus playable preview URLs for extension and subtitle sessions.
Frontend video reset/default handling now follows backend contract-derived defaults, and remaining standalone video state branching was reduced.
Frontend video controls now parse backend video_contract and consume backend-defined extension matrix, subtitle defaults, and enhance-prompt policy instead of locally deriving them.
Backend request normalization and contract field policies added for standalone video mode; explicit storyboard prompt now overrides deprecated tracking companion fields.
Backend video contract helper added, router-level video attachment semantics moved into backend service code, and focused pytest validation passed.
Backend-first implementation queue written and validated.
